pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py specification; synthetic data created during task execution
Official Magento 2 documentation: Default Category is the standard parent category in Magento installations (entity_id=2)
Verified via Magento 2 documentation and code analysis. Default Category has entity_id=2, parent_id=1. All subcategories created under Default Category will have parent_id=2
Magento 2 EAV model stores boolean attributes as integers. is_active=1 represents true/active status in catalog_category_entity_int table
Magento 2 EAV model stores boolean attributes as integers. include_in_menu=1 represents true/included status in catalog_category_entity_int table

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a new product category in Magento 2 with verified specifications: The category name 'Eco-Friendly' will be created as a subcategory under the Default Category (entity_id=2). The Default Category is the standard root category in Magento 2 installations with entity_id=2 and parent_id=1; new subcategories will have parent_id=2. All metadata attribute values are correct: is_active and include_in_menu are stored as integer 1 (true) in the EAV catalog_category_entity_int table. The category must be newly created (entity count increases), active, and included in the navigation menu.
